issue.title: 💥 Failed to execute 'querySelector' on 'Document': '#t-{private-dropbox-id} is not a valid selector.
issue.body:
### Steps to Reproduce

Uncertain, as there were several actions here and I only recall the last  couple

1. Swipe left to open context menu
2. Delete task

### Additional Console Output
On Android





























### Url
https://localhost/#/tag/TODAY/tasks
